title: Ways to work with us
description: Find a career, partner with us or apply to use our tools and facilities. As a DOE Office of Science national laboratory run by Stanford University, SLAC offers unique collaborations and opportunities to innovate. We seek out and engage people with a wide variety of experiences, ideas, skills and backgrounds.
text:
Table of Contents
Find a career, partner with us or apply to use our tools and facilities. As a DOE Office of Science national laboratory run by Stanford University, SLAC offers unique collaborations and opportunities to innovate. We seek out and engage people with a wide variety of experiences, ideas, skills and backgrounds.
Job openings at SLAC
At SLAC we make a real and positive impact on the world – and we welcome all to join us in this exciting pursuit.”
John Sarrao Lab Director
Make an impact
Career paths at SLAC
Find a career at SLAC and be a part of our exciting mission carried out in a partnership with Stanford University and the DOE Office of Science, the single largest supporter of basic research in the physical sciences in the United States. SLAC employees are also Stanford University employees, a workforce of 13,000 talented and dedicated people that each play a vital role in shaping our future leaders, supporting groundbreaking research and resolving some of the world’s greatest challenges.
Educational opportunities Find internships
Industry or research
Partnership opportunities
We work with companies to help spread the benefits of basic research out into society. Partnering with SLAC gives companies access to our world-class experimental facilities, expert scientists and patented technologies. We continuously strengthen our ties with industrial partners, Stanford, Silicon Valley and other government agencies that come to us with problems requiring the unique combination of facilities and expertise that only SLAC can provide.
SLAC is a place to thrive intellectually, to meet smart and motivated people and to participate in making the world a better place.”
Mohamed Othman Associate Staff Scientist, Technology Innovation Directorate
Work with us
Become a supplier or a user of our scientific facilities
SLAC is dedicated to the highest standards of service and conduct and continuous improvement of our operations. Our goal is to foster a valued and professional partnership with scientific users of our facilities and suppliers helping us in our mission of discovery and innovation.
Use our facilitiesBecome a supplier
Image gallery
Working at SLAC
Small Business Reception
At a small business opportunity day event, participants heard about SLAC’s Critical Utilities Infrastructure Revitalization Project (CUIR), a construction capital improvement project that aims to empower SLAC to continue its research mission and objectives for years to come.
Jim Gensheimer/SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory
Technology Innovation Directorate (TID) Computing Systems
Hoang Vu (foreground) and other members of TID's Scientific Computing Infrastructure Services Department work on servers in the rack room of the Stanford Research Computing Facility (SRCF-II) at SLAC.
Jim Gensheimer/SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory
STEER Commercialization Forum
At a forum hosted by STEER, a partnership between the SLAC-Stanford Battery Center and the Stanford Precourt Institute, experts discussed the commercialization potential for sodium-ion batteries.
Jim Gensheimer/SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory
It is empowering to see how much we are able to accomplish when we think big and join forces to serve a greater purpose.”
Chereace Marcellin Human resources
